**Checklist**
- [ ] `zig build` succeeds
- [ ] `zig build test && zig build test-integration` green
- [ ] Security-sensitive public-edge changes updated tests, corpus replay, and operator-facing security docs as needed
- [ ] New behavior covered by tests
- [ ] README / CHANGELOG updated if operator-visible behavior changed
